creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
New pop-up store has just opened on Oxford Street in London✨ @karacaunitedkingdom

Visit Karaca to discover their products from cookware and dinnerware to small kitchen appliances and tea & coffee accessories. Don’t miss their 2-for-1 deal! 🎁

Karaca truly feels like a go-to place for kitchenware, home and living🏠Their innovative products always stand out!

Future Stores and pop-ups are the new wave of commerce 🌍, the world’s biggest brands have appeared here, and now Karaca takes the spotlight 💫Expect a stylish ambience, a curated selection, and a prime central location 

Future Stores pioneers immersive retail spaces using massive LED screens, interactive technologies (like AI and VR), and live events to create a dynamic, living brand stage🛍️

🕒 Opening times: 11:00–20:00 (Sat–Fri); 11:00–18:00 (Sun)
📅 Until the end of December
📍 Karaca at Future Stores, 95 Oxford St, London W1D 2AD

Ad
